title: QFINHUB Off-Topic / Topical Risk Review — Round 2
policy: MONITOR ONLY. Do NOT noindex without Auditor + Technical Guardian approval. Do NOT optimize CTR for off-topic pages.

pages_reviewed.topical_relevance: LOW — Pop culture (reality TV) with forced mortgage angle. The connection to finance is tangential at best.
pages_reviewed.adsense_risk: MEDIUM — Thin content masquerading as finance. AdSense reviewers may flag this as low-quality or unrelated to site's core topic.
pages_reviewed.seo_topical_authority_risk: HIGH — Google sees a finance site ranking for '90 day fiance'. This dilutes topical authority and confuses Google's understanding of what QFINHUB is about.
pages_reviewed.brand_risk: HIGH — A serious financial calculator platform ranking for reality TV gossip undermines professional credibility.
pages_reviewed.recommendation: NOINDEX_CONSIDER — If impressions grow past 10 or position improves, prepare noindex proposal for Auditor + Technical Guardian. Do NOT execute yet.

pages_reviewed.topical_relevance: MEDIUM-LOW — Hungary central bank rate hold + mortgage angle. The mortgage connection exists but the Hungary angle is niche and unrelated to QFINHUB's US-focused calculator audience.
pages_reviewed.adsense_risk: LOW-MEDIUM — Has mortgage content but Hungary central bank angle could confuse ad targeting.
pages_reviewed.seo_topical_authority_risk: MEDIUM — Ranking for Hungary-specific queries dilutes US-focused finance authority. 23 impressions is significant — Google is testing this page's relevance.
pages_reviewed.brand_risk: LOW — Still finance-related, just not US-focused.
pages_reviewed.recommendation: HOLD — Do NOT optimize. Do NOT noindex yet. Monitor impressions. If >50 imp or position improves to top 5, re-evaluate.
pages_reviewed.query_example: Hungary interest rate / mortgage related queries (23 total imp)

pages_reviewed.topical_relevance: MEDIUM-LOW — UK financial news + mortgage angle. UK market relevance is low for a US-focused platform.
pages_reviewed.seo_topical_authority_risk: MEDIUM — UK-specific content on US site. Dilutes geo-relevance.
pages_reviewed.recommendation: HOLD — Monitor only. Low impressions but position 5 is notable. If impressions grow, re-evaluate.
pages_reviewed.query_example: UK gilt yields / mortgage related queries

pages_reviewed.topical_relevance: LOW — Stock picking / market news, not calculator/educational content.
pages_reviewed.seo_topical_authority_risk: LOW — 1 impression, low risk for now.
pages_reviewed.recommendation: HOLD — Monitor only. 1 impression is negligible.

pages_reviewed.topical_relevance: LOW — Emerging market commentary, not educational finance.
MEDIUM — Fed rate + mortgage angle. More relevant than most newsjacking pages but still thin news commentary.

risk_assessment: MODERATE — 16% of impressions from off-topic pages is manageable but requires monitoring. 90 Day Fiance at position 8.5 with growing impressions is the primary concern. Hungary at 23 impressions (10.8% of all traffic) needs watching.

noindex_proposal_candidates.trigger: Impressions >10 OR position improves to top 3
